content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit framework imported and HMHomeManager() instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5-6, but this is a wallpaper app with no home-automation UI or accessory management anywhere in view/description.

Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to be tied to genuine home-automation functionality; an unused `HMHomeManager` in a wallpaper app looks like framework misuse or leftover template code that could trigger a rejection or app review question. This will likely also require an unjustified `NSHomeKitUsageDescription`/entitlement, raising a red flag during review. Recommend removing the HomeKit import/entitlement entirely unless home-automation features are actually planned.
